content: FRED API for SPX options traders: Free API, register at fred.stlouisfed.org for free api_key. Endpoint: https://api.stlouisfed.org/fred/series/observations?series_id=SERIES&api_key=KEY&file_type=json. Series IDs: DFF (Effective Federal Funds Rate, daily), DGS1MO (1-Month Treasury CMR, daily), DGS3MO (3-Month Treasury CMR, daily), SOFR (Secured Overnight Financing Rate, daily, from 2018-04-03), T10Y2Y (10Y minus 2Y Treasury spread, daily -- yield curve inversion signal), T10Y3M (10Y minus 3M spread, alternative inversion measure), VIXCLS (CBOE VIX, daily, from 1990). Additional useful: DFII10 (10Y TIPS breakeven inflation), UMCSENT (University of Michigan consumer sentiment, monthly), FEDFUNDS (Fed Funds effective rate, monthly). Existing Morai FRED adapter covers REST already; sidecar should NOT duplicate this -- keep FRED in the TS server. Key for BSM: DFF or SOFR is the risk-free rate; DGS3MO is what most practitioners use for short-dated SPX options.
